notes: createPracticeModeAdapter was converted from skeleton to a working thin adapter, including LocationKey mapping, engine-to-spec rejection translation, legal action translation, and engine-internal rejection suppression for source-not-clean and dry-run-blocked.

Engine reason refinement was implemented across ingredientAdd, actionExecute, and pourDryRun, and computeLegalActions now stays aligned with try* decisions including ENGINE_SPEC 14.4 empty-payload pour.
sessionView formatter symbols were split into sessionTextFormat.ts, while sessionView.ts retains VM calculators only; PracticeSessionPage and PracticeAdminPage were limited to import rewiring.
Build, lint, and tsc were revalidated successfully. Vitest was rerun after a sandbox spawn EPERM and passed for the targeted 8 suites / 121 tests.
docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md and docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md were updated within the allowed worker-doc exception scope.
